entries.title: Road corridor (sidewalks + embankments)
entries.notes: Code/Pieces/RoadCorridorPiece.cs

entries.title: Kit pine tree
entries.notes: Built; place via WorkbenchScene when requested

entries.title: Fire hydrant
entries.notes: Built; place via WorkbenchScene when requested

entries.title: Tripo stylized wolf test
entries.notes: LEGACY donor prototype (not the active pipeline). Installed v27 donor rig: reported -90 facing and tear 341; bones-only facingOk is not authoritative for this package. Prefer tripo_wolf_scratch_v5_* for new work.

entries.title: Tripo wolf Rigify v3 prototype
entries.notes: LEGACY Rigify/retarget prototype (not the active pipeline). Mesh-fitted Rigify deform rig + 12 retargeted Wolf takes, +90 so snout/head bones agree at -Y, tear ~499. Prefer tripo_wolf_scratch_v5_* for new work.

entries.title: Tripo wolf from-scratch v4
entries.notes: No donor. Landmark deform rig + Jaw + procedural Attack/Death/Gallop/Idle/Walk. Real jaw bite, bilateral lunge, side-fall Death, quieter head/neck. facingOk, tear 209. Reuses Tripo wolf material.

entries.title: Tripo wolf from-scratch v5 balanced
entries.notes: Donor-free v5 profiled procedural anims. balanced: reference-plus — preserve v4 stride, reduce torso motion 15%, head/neck 25%, vertical root bounce 30%. Jaw bite, bilateral lunge, side-fall Death, quieter head/neck. facingOk, tear 193. Material: Tripo wolf basecolor.

entries.title: Tripo wolf from-scratch v5 grounded
entries.notes: Donor-free v5 profiled procedural anims. grounded: stable/grounded — half axial and head motion, 10% shorter limb arcs, 35% less root travel, 80% less vertical bounce. Jaw bite, bilateral lunge, side-fall Death, quieter head/neck. facingOk, tear 166. Material: Tripo wolf basecolor.

entries.title: Tripo wolf from-scratch v5 athletic
entries.notes: Donor-free v5 profiled procedural anims. athletic: predatory — 18% longer limb arcs, 15% more root drive and tail action, head/neck restrained to 70%. Jaw bite, bilateral lunge, side-fall Death, quieter head/neck. facingOk, tear 229. Material: Tripo wolf basecolor.

entries.title: Panther from-scratch v5 balanced
entries.notes: Donor-free geometry-only rebuild from thorns panther. Balanced reference motion; Jaw bite, bilateral lunge, side-fall Death, quieter head/neck. facingOk at 0 degrees, height 1.10, tear 179. Shared copied panther basecolor.

entries.title: Panther from-scratch v5 grounded
entries.notes: Donor-free geometry-only rebuild from thorns panther. Stable motion with reduced axial/head/root travel; Jaw bite, bilateral lunge, side-fall Death, quieter head/neck. facingOk at 0 degrees, height 1.10, tear 151. Shared copied panther basecolor.

entries.title: Panther from-scratch v5 athletic
entries.notes: Donor-free geometry-only rebuild from thorns panther. Longer limb arcs with increased root/tail drive; Jaw bite, bilateral lunge, side-fall Death, quieter head/neck. facingOk at 0 degrees, height 1.10, tear 207. Shared copied panther basecolor.
